The Global Profile2026

David Chen

VC Visionary
Midas List Newcomer 2024

"David Chen is a seasoned investor with a track record of identifying high-growth opportunities in the fintech and edutech sectors. He oversees the 'Chen Global Fund' and mentors early-stage founders."

David's philosophy is rooted in long-term resilience. He looks beyond market fluctuations to find founders who are obsessed with solving fundamental human problems. Through Chen Global, he has deployed over $500M into early-stage startups that are now redefining regional economies.

Key Milestones

2023

Investor of the Year

Awarded by the Asian Venture Capital Forum.

2021

Social Impact Mark

First investor to tie fund performance to regional educational metrics.

format_quote

Personal Perspective

"Capital follows value; value precedes capital."

"The best time to build is when everyone else is waiting."

Did You Know?

1

Was an early investor in three of Southeast Asia's top decacorns.

2

Began his career as a quantitative trader in London.

3

Active philanthropist supporting STEM education in rural Asia.
